title: Visits and technical assistance: Request form - Bank of Canada
content:
## Visits and technical assistance: Request form
Use this form to request a visit or technical assistance.
We host organizations for meetings with our experts at Head Office. We also provide technical assistance to other central banks and supervisory authorities. Requests are considered and prioritized by their relevance to our expertise.
- Include as much detail as possible. Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are mandatory.
- Complete and submit one form per request.
- If you have any questions, contact us .
Personal information collected by the Bank of Canada is protected under the Privacy Act . The information you provide is used to respond to your inquiry. For further information about the Bank of Canada’s privacy practices, please consult the Bank’s General Privacy Policy .
